brief_title: Neoadjuvant Plus Adjuvant or Only Adjuvant Nab- Paclitaxel Plus Gemcitabine for Resectable Pancreatic Cancer
official_title: Neoadjuvant Plus Adjuvant or Only Adjuvant Nab-Paclitaxel Plus Gemcitabine for Resectable Pancreatic Cancer: A Prospective, Randomized, Controlled, Phase II Study of the AIO (Working Group for Medical Oncology From the German Cancer Society) Pancreatic Cancer Group

pmids.citation: Seufferlein T, Uhl W, Kornmann M, Algul H, Friess H, Konig A, Ghadimi M, Gallmeier E, Bartsch DK, Lutz MP, Metzger R, Wille K, Gerdes B, Schimanski CC, Graupe F, Kunzmann V, Klein I, Geissler M, Staib L, Waldschmidt D, Bruns C, Wittel U, Fichtner-Feigl S, Daum S, Hinke A, Blome L, Tannapfel A, Kleger A, Berger AW, Kestler AMR, Schuhbaur JS, Perkhofer L, Tempero M, Reinacher-Schick AC, Ettrich TJ. Perioperative or only adjuvant gemcitabine plus nab-paclitaxel for resectable pancreatic cancer (NEONAX)-a randomized phase II trial of the AIO pancreatic cancer group. Ann Oncol. 2023 Jan;34(1):91-100. doi: 10.1016/j.annonc.2022.09.161. Epub 2022 Oct 7.

Ettrich TJ, Berger AW, Perkhofer L, Daum S, Konig A, Dickhut A, Wittel U, Wille K, Geissler M, Algul H, Gallmeier E, Atzpodien J, Kornmann M, Muche R, Prasnikar N, Tannapfel A, Reinacher-Schick A, Uhl W, Seufferlein T. Neoadjuvant plus adjuvant or only adjuvant nab-paclitaxel plus gemcitabine for resectable pancreatic cancer - the NEONAX trial (AIO-PAK-0313), a prospective, randomized, controlled, phase II study of the AIO pancreatic cancer group. BMC Cancer. 2018 Dec 29;18(1):1298. doi: 10.1186/s12885-018-5183-y.
